title: Flora cows
description: Embark on a bovine adventure like never before with the "Flora Cows" Minecraft mod! Say farewell to the plain, ordinary cows and welcome a diverse herd that adapts to the unique environments of Minecraft's many flowers
body:
Embark on a bovine adventure like never before with the "Flora Cows" Minecraft mod! Say farewell to the plain, ordinary cows and welcome a diverse herd that adapts to the unique environments of Minecraft's many flowers.

Unleash the charm of flora cows as they roam across the landscape, each with its distinct appearance and special attributes. Whether you're exploring the dense forests, scaling snowy peaks, or venturing into the scorching deserts, you'll encounter cows perfectly adapted to their surroundings. Each flora cow drops its specific flower type. With Poppy cows dropping Poppys, and Cornflower cows dropping cornflowers.
